zh.Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Spain: 西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納索布拉多
zh.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño是Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela和Teresa Bermudes de Trava的兒子，出生在西班牙加利西亞。他和Aldonza Pérez de Carrión至少有4個女兒。他於1184年被列為alferes real do rei fernando iii。他去世於1218年2月之後在西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納索布拉多，埋葬在西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納索布拉多。

zh-hans.Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Spain: 西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納索布拉多
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño是Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela和Teresa Bermudes de Trava的儿子，出生在西班牙加利西亞。他和Aldonza Pérez de Carrión至少有4个女儿。他于1184年被列为alferes real do rei fernando iii。他去世于1218年2月之后在西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納索布拉多，埋葬在西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納索布拉多。

nameMeanings.name: Fernández
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Luis, Jorge, Miguel, Fernando, Mario, Jesus, Pedro, Francisco.  Portuguese Ligia, Joao, Armanda, Godofredo, Wenceslao.

Spanish (Fernández): patronymic from the personal name Fernando . The surname (and to a lesser extent the variant Hernandez ) has also been established in southern Italy, mainly in Naples and Palermo, since the period of Spanish dominance there.

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the name in 1 above at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some Jewish descendants retained the surname that their families had adopted as Roman Catholics.

variants.name: Fernando
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Luis, Orlando, Aida, Carlos, Jesusa, Rodolfo, Ruben, Adela, Alfredo, Alicia.  Indian Rohan, Lalith, Nimal, Rajiv, Sanjeeva, Shanthi, Anil, Anusha, Dushan, Kapila, Lakshman, Mallika.

Spanish and Portuguese: from the personal name Fernando, a younger form of Ferdinando (see Ferdinand ). This surname is also found in southern Italy, mainly in Naples and Palermo, since the period of Spanish dominance there, and as a result of the expulsion of the Jews from Spain and Portugal at the end of the 15th century, many of whom moved to Italy. It is also common in western India and especially in Sri Lanka, where it was taken by Portuguese colonists in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toroño
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmela, Sal, Salvatore.  French Alphonse, Dominique.
habitational name from the city of Turin (Italian Torino) in northern Italy, or from Torino di Sangro (Chieti).

variants.name: Toro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Luis, Juan, Rafael, Angel, Raul, Jaime, Julio, Miguel, Manuel, Efrain.
Spanish: habitational name from Toro in Zamora province. Compare   De Toro  .

Italian and Spanish: nickname for a lusty person or for someone who owned a bull, or a metonymic occupational name for a tender of bulls or possibly for a bull fighter, from toro ‘bull’ (from Latin taurus). Compare Del Toro .

nameMeanings.name: Rodrigo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame’ + rīc ‘power’. It was the name of the last king of the Visigoths, defeated by the Moors in 711 .

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño was born in Galicia, Spain as the son of Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela and Teresa Bermudes de Trava. He had at least 4 daughters with Aldonza Pérez de Carrión. In 1184, his occupation is listed as alferes real do rei fernando iii. He died after February 1218, in Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Spain, and was buried in Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño est né à Galicia, Espagne, fils de Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela et Teresa Bermudes de Trava. Il a eu au moins 4 filles avec Aldonza Pérez de Carrión. En 1184, sa profession de son indiquée est alferes real do rei fernando iii. Il est décédé après février 1218, à Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Espagne, et a été enterré à Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño wurde in Galicia, Spanien, als Sohn von Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela und Teresa Bermudes de Trava geboren. Er hatte mit Aldonza Pérez de Carrión mindestens 4 Töchter. 1184 ist sein Beruf als alferes real do rei fernando iii aufgeführt. Er starb nach Februar 1218 in Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Spanien und wurde in Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño è nato il nel Galicia, Spagna come figlio di Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela e Teresa Bermudes de Trava. Lui avuto almeno 4 figlie con Aldonza Pérez de Carrión. Nel 1184, la sua occupazione è indicata come alferes real do rei fernando iii. Morì dopo il febbraio 1218, nel Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Spagna, e fu sepolto a Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Spagna.

ja.Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Spain: スペインガリシアア コルnアソブラド
ja.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Fernández de ToroñoはスペインガリシアでFernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y BatisselaとTeresa Bermudes de Travaの息子として生まれた。彼はAldonza Pérez de Carriónとの間に少なくとも4人の娘をもうけた。1184年，職業はalferes real do rei fernando iiiと記録されている。彼は1218年2月以後にスペインガリシアア コルnアソブラドで死去し，スペインガリシアア コルnアソブラドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño(은)는 스페인 갈리샤에서 Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela(와)과 Teresa Bermudes de Trava의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Aldonza Pérez de Carrión(와)과 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1184년, 그의 직업은 alferes real do rei fernando iii이었다. 그는 1218년 2월 이후 스페인 갈리샤 에이 코루n아 소브라도에서 사망했으며 스페인 갈리샤 에이 코루n아 소브라도에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño nasceu em Galicia, Espanha filho de Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela e Teresa Bermudes de Trava. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhas com Aldonza Pérez de Carrión. Em 1184, sua profissão aparece como alferes real do rei fernando iii. Ele faleceu após fevereiro de 1218, em Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Espanha, e foi sepultado em Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño родился в местности галися, Испания. Его родителей звали Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela и Teresa Bermudes de Trava. У него было по крайней мере 4 дочери от Aldonza Pérez de Carrión. В 1184 году он работал по профессии alferes real do rei fernando iii. Он умер после февраль 1218 г. в местности собрадо, а коруnа, галися, Испания и был похоронен в местности собрадо, а коруnа, галися, Испания.

sm.27 de março de 1184 - 1185: mai le 27 Mati 1184 e o'o I le 1185

es.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño nació en Galicia, España como hijo de Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela y Teresa Bermudes de Trava. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijas con Aldonza Pérez de Carrión. En 1184, su ocupación registrada era alferes real do rei fernando iii. Murió después de febrero de 1218, en Sobrado, La Coruña, Galicia, España, y fue sepultado en Sobrado, La Coruña, Galicia, España.
